lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam saadhoo saranaaee |
lines.english: In the Sanctuary of the Holy, chant the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bachanee gat mit paaee |
lines.english: Through the True Guru's Teachings, one comes to know His state and extent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਮੇਲਣਹਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੭॥੩॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak har jap har man mere har mele melanahaaraa he |17|3|9|
lines.english: Nanak: chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, O my mind; the Lord, the Uniter, shall unite you with Himself. ||17||3||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਰਹੁ ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੁਗਧ ਇਆਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: ghar rahu re man mugadh eaane |
lines.english: Remain in your own home, O my foolish and ignorant mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਅੰਤਰਗਤਿ ਧਿਆਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: raam japahu antaragat dhiaane |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord - concentrate deep within your being and meditate on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬਿਸਰਿਐ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਣਿ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis bisariai jam johan laagai |
lines.english: If you forget Him, the Messenger of Death will catch sight of you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਚ ਛੋਡਿ ਰਚਹੁ ਅਪਰੰਪਰਿ ਇਉ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: laalach chhodd rachahu aparanpar iau paavahu mukat duaaraa he |1|
lines.english: Renounce your greed, and merge with the infinite Lord. In this way, you shall find the door of liberation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਸੁਖ ਜਾਹਿ ਦੁਖਾ ਫੁਨਿ ਆਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh sukh jaeh dukhaa fun aagai |
lines.english: All peace will be gone, and you will suffer in pain in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੀਅੜੇ ਏਹੁ ਪਰਮ ਤਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raam naam jap guramukh jeearre ehu param tat veechaaraa he |2|
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord as Gurmukh, O my soul; this is the supreme essence of contemplation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਹਹੁ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਏਹੁ ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ahinis raam rahahu rang raate ehu jap tap sanjam saaraa he |3|
lines.english: Day and night, remain imbued with the Lord's Love. This is the essence of all chanting, deep meditation and self-discipline. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਡੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har ras antar ddeetthaa |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, see the essence of the Lord deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਰਸੁ ਮੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu ras meetthaa |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, the sweetest essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਬੋਲਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam gur bachanee bolahu |
lines.english: Speak the Guru's Word, and the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਭਾ ਮਹਿ ਇਹੁ ਰਸੁ ਟੋਲਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sant sabhaa meh ihu ras ttolahu |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, search for this essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach teerath naavahu har gun gaavahu |
lines.english: Bathe at the sacred shrine of Truth, and sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਖੋਜਿ ਲਹਹੁ ਘਰੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਗਰਭ ਮਝਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramat khoj lahahu ghar apanaa bahurr na garabh majhaaraa he |4|
lines.english: Follow the Guru's Teachings - seek and find the home of your own self, and you shall never be consigned to the womb of reincarnation again. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਵਡ ਦਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh daataa vadd daanaa |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Primal Being, the Great Giver, is all-knowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤ ਕਾਲਿ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲਹੁ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: ant kaal jam johi na saakai har bolahu raam piaaraa he |5|
lines.english: At the very last moment, the Messenger of Death will not be able to touch you, if you chant the Name of the Beloved Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: tat veechaarahu har liv laavahu |
lines.english: Reflect upon the essence of reality, and lovingly focus your consciousness on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਸੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis antar saach su sabad samaanaa |
lines.english: Whoever has Truth within himself, merges in the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਚੂਕਾ ਜਮ ਭੈ ਭਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jis kau satigur mel milaae tis chookaa jam bhai bhaaraa he |6|
lines.english: One whom the True Guru unites in Union, is rid of the overpowering fear of death. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਆਤਮ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aatam raam raam hai aatam har paaeeai sabad veechaaraa he |7|
lines.english: The soul is the Lord, and the Lord is the soul; contemplating the Shabad, the Lord is found. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਲੈ ਚੀਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: tis meh raam ratan lai cheenee |
lines.english: Know that the Lord's jewel is within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਤਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਕੀਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: panch tat mil kaaeaa keenee |
lines.english: The body is formed from the union of the five elements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਮਾ ਗਹਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: khimaa gahahu satigur saranaaee |
lines.english: Hold tight to compassion and the Sanctuary of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤ ਸੰਤੋਖਿ ਰਹਹੁ ਜਨ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sat santokh rahahu jan bhaaee |
lines.english: Abide in truth and contentment, O humble Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮੁ ਚੀਨਿ ਪਰਾਤਮੁ ਚੀਨਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਇਹੁ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: aatam cheen paraatam cheenahu gur sangat ihu nisataaraa he |8|
lines.english: Know your soul, and know the Supreme Soul; associating with the Guru, you shall be emancipated. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਕੂੜ ਕਪਟ ਮਹਿ ਟੇਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: saakat koorr kapatt meh ttekaa |
lines.english: The faithless cynics are stuck in falsehood and deceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਆਵਹਿ ਫੁਨਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਗ੍ਰਭ ਜੋਨੀ ਨਰਕ ਮਝਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: bin simaran aaveh fun jaaveh grabh jonee narak majhaaraa he |9|
lines.english: Without meditative remembrance, they come and then go, and are cast into the hellish womb of reincarnation. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਅਨੇਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: ahinis nindaa kareh anekaa |
lines.english: Day and night, they slander many others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਕੀ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕੀ ਲੀਜੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਅਫਰਿਓ ਭਾਰੁ ਅਫਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: baakee dharam raae kee leejai sir afario bhaar afaaraa he |10|
lines.english: He has to answer to the Righteous Judge of Dharma for the account of his actions; the egotistical being carries the unbearable load. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਕਾਣਿ ਨ ਚੂਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: saakat jam kee kaan na chookai |
lines.english: The faithless cynic is not rid of his fear of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕਾ ਡੰਡੁ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਮੂਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: jam kaa ddandd na kabahoo mookai |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death's club is never taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਤਾ ਭਵਜਲਿ ਪਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai karataa bhavajal pariaa |
lines.english: Acting egotistically, he falls into the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਾਕਤੁ ਕਹਹੁ ਕੋ ਤਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur saakat kahahu ko tariaa |
lines.english: Tell me: without the Guru, what faithless cynic has been saved?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਈ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: bin gur paar na paavai koee har japeeai paar utaaraa he |11|
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one is saved; meditating on the Lord, they are carried across to the other side. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਦਾਤਿ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee daat na mettai koee |
lines.english: No one can erase the Guru's blessings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬਖਸੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਾਰੇ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis bakhase tis taare soee |
lines.english: The Lord carries across those whom He forgives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਮਨਿ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪਰ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: janam maran dukh nerr na aavai man so prabh apar apaaraa he |12|
lines.english: The pains of birth and death do not even approach those whose minds are filled with God, the infinite and endless. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਭੂਲੇ ਆਵਹੁ ਜਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur te bhoole aavahu jaavahu |
lines.english: Those who forget the Guru come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮਿ ਮਰਹੁ ਫੁਨਿ ਪਾਪ ਕਮਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: janam marahu fun paap kamaavahu |
lines.english: They are born, only to die again, and continue committing sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਮੂੜ ਅਚੇਤ ਨ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਤਾ ਰਾਮੁ ਪੁਕਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: saakat moorr achet na cheteh dukh laagai taa raam pukaaraa he |13|
lines.english: The unconscious, foolish, faithless cynic does not remember the Lord; but when he is stricken with pain, then he cries out for the Lord. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਦਾਤੈ ਦੀਏ ॥
lines.translit: so jaanai jin daatai dee |
lines.english: The Giver, who blesses us with these - He alone knows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸ ਕਉ ਦੋਸੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਤੂ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਸਹੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਕੀਆ ਕਰਾਰਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: kis kau dos dehi too praanee sahu apanaa keea karaaraa he |14|
lines.english: So who can you blame, O mortal being? The hardships you suffer are from your own actions. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪੁਰਬ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕੀਏ ॥
lines.translit: sukh dukh purab janam ke kee |
lines.english: Pleasure and pain are the consequences of the actions of past lives.
